title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies!
